# opnsense_interface_vxlan (Resource)

Manages a VXLAN interface on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `local` (String) Local source IP address.
- `vni` (Number) VXLAN network identifier (0-16777215).

### Optional

- `device` (String) Underlying interface.
- `device_id` (Number) VXLAN device number (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
- `group` (String) Multicast group IP (multicast mode).
- `remote` (String) Remote peer IP (unicast mode).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
